parameters.text:
=You are a Senior SDET. Analyze the following requirements for a {{ $json.body.Platform }} application in the {{ $json.body.Domain }} domain. 

Generate comprehensive QA test cases covering positive, negative, and edge scenarios based on these requirements. 

Requirements: {{ $json.body.Requirements || $json.body.Notes }}
Jira Story ID: {{ $json.body['Jira Story ID'] }}

You MUST return a valid JSON object containing a single array named "test_cases". Each object in the array must strictly match the following keys:
- "ID" (String, e.g., SMK-001)
- "Test case Title" (String)
- "Test Step" (String)
- "Test Data" (String, use specific data if applicable, otherwise leave blank)
- "Expected Result" (String)
- "Jira id" (String, use the provided Jira Story ID)
